description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark brown top and sides, accented by vertical golden stripes on the front edges. The front face features a single large drawer with a brass-colored label holder and a subtle handle, suggesting easy access for document storage. The back and side panels are plain, with a consistent reddish-brown finish, while the base is slightly recessed, giving the cabinet a sturdy yet unobtrusive profile. The front panel is visually distinct, with a decorative, checkered pattern and a central vertical strip, adding a vintage touch. The materials appear to be primarily wood or wood composite, with metallic accents for the handle and label holder. This cabinet is designed for practical use in urban environments, such as offices or archives, where organization and accessibility are important.
description: A compact, vintage-style filing cabinet with a dark wood finish, golden edge accents, and a single large drawer featuring a brass label holder and handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main drawer with a brass label holder and golden edge accents.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, reddish-brown panel with golden vertical stripes at the front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting a decorative checkered pattern and central vertical strip, with golden edge accents.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain reddish-brown panel and golden front edge.
